title: Beginner Biology Challenge
description: Learn and test your understanding of basic biology concepts with this beginner-level challenge!

questions.questionText: What is the basic unit of life?
questions.explanation: The cell is the smallest unit of life that can perform all life processes.

questions.questionText: Which organ pumps blood throughout the body?
questions.explanation: The heart pumps blood throughout the body via the circulatory system.

questions.questionText: What do we call a group of the same species living in the same area?
questions.explanation: A population is a group of organisms of the same species living in the same area.
DNA (deoxyribonucleic acid) is the molecule that carries genetic information.

questions.questionText: Which part of a plant is responsible for photosynthesis?
questions.explanation: The leaf contains chlorophyll, which captures sunlight for photosynthesis.

rewards.description: Earn 150 points for completing this beginner-level challenge!
Unlock the 'Biology Starter' badge for completing this challenge!
